text: Lesson 35 Our village Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 第35课 我们的村庄 听录音,然后回答这个问题。
zh_hant: 第35課 我們的村莊 聽錄音,然後回答這個問題。

text: Are the children coming out of the park or going into it?
zh: 孩子们是从公园里出来,还是正走进去?
zh_hant: 孩子們是從公園裡出來,還是正走進去?

text: This is a photograph of our village.
zh: 这是一张我们村庄的照片。
zh_hant: 這是一張我們村莊的照片。

text: Our village is in a valley.
zh: 我们的村庄在一个山谷里。
zh_hant: 我們的村莊在一個山谷裡。

text: The village is on a river.
Here is another photograph of the village.
zh: 这是村庄的另一张照片。
zh_hant: 這是村莊的另一張照片。

text: My wife and I are walking along the banks of the river.
zh: 我和妻子正沿着河岸散步。
zh_hant: 我和妻子正沿著河岸散步。

text: There is a boy in the water.
He is swimming across the river.
The park is on the right.
Some children are coming out of the building.
zh: 一些孩子正从楼里出来。
zh_hant: 一些孩子正從樓裡出來。

text: Some of them are going into the park.
zh: 他们中有些人正走进公园。
zh_hant: 他們中有些人正走進公園。
